name: Elisa Rose L.
one_line_review: "Great Directory Syndication and Review Generation Tool"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Sometimes the review request feature can have a glitch but it's normally easy enough to figure out. Directory Syndication is very straight forward, intuitive and fast.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

directory management for SEO, Reputation Management and Review Generation.
reviewer_details:
Vice President & Founding Member

Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.)
